home.headline: Built to keep the world's tractors running.
home.lead: Wholesale supply of precision-engineered agricultural parts to distributors, workshops, and re-exporters across Asia, Africa, and Latin America — backed by VKG Impex.
home.whatWeDoHeading: Tractor parts. Sourced in India. Shipped worldwide.
home.whatWeDoText: We supply OEM, Tier 1 aftermarket, and unbranded parts to distributors, workshops, and re-exporters. Every major tractor brand built or sourced in India is in our range — and our manufacturing partners cover unbranded equivalents for global brands too.
home.emphasis: Send us a part number. We'll find it.
home.whyBuyersHeading: Three reasons distributors stay with VKG.
home.reason1Desc: Direct relationships with Tier 1 manufacturers. No counterfeit risk, no middleman markup.
home.reason2Desc: Low minimums for new buyers. Flexible payment terms. Full export documentation handled in-house.
home.reason3Desc: Four to five weeks from order to shipping. Reliable enough to plan a harvest around.
home.componentsHeading: Eight categories. Tens of thousands of SKUs.
home.vkgFoundationHeading: Twenty years of export infrastructure behind every order.
home.vkgFoundationText: VKG Agri Parts sits on top of two decades of supplier relationships, shipping lanes, and distributor partnerships built by VKG Impex across Asia, Africa, and Latin America. That's why we deliver what newer exporters struggle with — consistent quality, reliable lead times, and parts that arrive exactly as promised.
home.getStartedHeading: Send us your parts list — get a quote in 24 hours.
home.getStartedText: Five to ten part numbers and your monthly volumes is all we need. Pricing and lead times back within 24 hours — no commitment, just a benchmark against your current sourcing.

about.headline: Two decades in exports. Now focused on the field.
about.intro: VKG Agri Parts is the agricultural division of VKG Impex. For over twenty years, we've been shipping genuine OEM and Tier 1 aftermarket parts out of New Delhi to distributors across Asia, Africa, and Latin America.
about.para1: We started this division because agricultural buyers needed something different. Harvest doesn't wait. A tractor down in peak season costs a farmer real money. The right part has to fit, last a full season under load, and get there before the work starts. That's a different conversation from selling car parts, and it deserves its own focus.
about.whatWeDoText1: We send tractor and farm equipment parts from India to independent distributors, retailers, and workshops around the world. Engines, hydraulics, filters, clutches, transmissions, electricals, the consumables that get used up every season — that's our range.
about.whatWeDoText2: Some markets want branded parts. Others do better with unbranded Tier 1 quality at a sharper price. We do both. The part is the same either way; we just match the labelling to what works for you.
about.builtOn: Built on Twenty Years of Groundwork
about.builtOnText1: We're not new to this. VKG Impex has spent two decades building the things that actually matter for export — a real supplier network with hundreds of Indian manufacturers, clean documentation, working shipping lanes across Asia, Africa, and Latin America, and most importantly, distributors who keep coming back because the parts showed up when promised and worked the way we said they would.
about.builtOnText2: That's why we can offer what newer exporters struggle with — low minimum orders, flexible payment terms, four to five week lead times, and all the export paperwork handled in-house so you don't have to chase it.
about.whoWeWorkText1: Independent distributors. Family-run parts shops. Workshop networks. Re-exporters serving rural markets. Anyone who needs reliable parts at a fair landed cost without the markup of going through a regional middleman.
about.whoWeWorkText2: Big or small, the minimums are reasonable and the conversation is straightforward. The fastest way to find out if we can supply what you need is to send us a part number.
about.letsTalkText: That's the fastest way to find out if we can supply what you need.

brands.headline: Brands We Cover
brands.intro: We supply parts for all major tractor brands — sourced from our network of partners and manufacturing partners across India. OEM, Tier 1 aftermarket, and unbranded options available.
brands.notSeeYoursHeading: Send us a part number — chances are we can source it.

contact.headline: Send us your inquiry.
contact.intro: Placeholder copy. Share your parts list, target quantities, and destination — we'll send back a detailed quotation within one business day.
